source: Based on ACSM/NSCA guidelines, 2024-2025 meta-regression research, and free-exercise-db (800+ exercises, Public Domain)

progressive_overload.description: The foundation of all training adaptation. Gradually increase training stress over time.
methods: Increase weight by 2.5-5% when target reps are achieved
Add 1-2 reps per set within target rep range
Increase training frequency for a muscle group
Improve range of motion or tempo control
progressive_overload.deload: Every 4-6 weeks, reduce volume by 40-50% for 1 week to allow recovery

2_days.split: Full Body A + Full Body B

volume_guidelines.description: Weekly sets per muscle group (based on 2024-2025 meta-regression research)

strength.note: Strength gains plateau faster with increasing volume than hypertrophy

rep_ranges_by_goal.note: Periodically varying rep ranges (e.g., 4 weeks hypertrophy, 2 weeks strength) optimizes long-term progress

session_structure.warmup: 5-10 minutes light cardio + dynamic stretching + 1-2 warmup sets of first exercise
exercise_order: 1. Compound multi-joint exercises first (squat, deadlift, bench, rows, OHP)

recovery.protein_intake: 1.6-2.2g per kg bodyweight per day for muscle growth
